title: Task Instance Spec
purpose: Define the structured planning contract used to turn a user task instruction into a persisted task instance.
validation: The instruction must preserve the original run task wording while the goal is normalized from it.
The goal must be normalized from the task instruction and grounded in the harness blueprint.
Constraints must include run policy and harness capability boundaries.
Per-agent assignments must align with the actual harness agent roster.
The final deliverable must name one responsible agent, define the delivery format, and distinguish it from the final report.
